title: freylinia undulata var. longiflora
intro: Freylinia undulata var. longiflora, also known as the long-flowered Freylinia or long-flowered Frey's glory flower, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Freylinia undulata var. longiflora include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
